name: Glorified Chicken
recipeIngredient: 10 1/4 ounces Campbell's Cream of Chicken Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. SKILLET: In a skillet over medium heat, add hot oil. Cook chicken for 10 minutes or until browned on all sides. Remove any excess fat.
2. Stir in the Campbell's Cream of Chicken Soup, pepper, and thyme. Reduce heat to low. Cover and simmer for 35 minutes or until the chicken is fork-tender, stirring occasionally.
3. OVEN: Substitute 1 tablespoon melted margarine for oil. Arrange the chicken skin-side up in a 12 x 8-inch baking dish. Drizzle with margarine. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes.
4. Spoon the soup mixture over the chicken. Continue to bake for an additional 20 minutes or until the chicken is fork-tender. Stir the sauce before serving.
5. Makes 4 servings.
Tip: If desired, remove skin from the chicken. Combine the soup and 2 tablespoons water before adding to the skillet or spooning over the chicken.
